Our Mission

Committed to every child's growth and potential.

Mission Statement

Children Of Promise is a DCFS licensed daycare center serving the needs of all in our own and surrounding communities from birth all the way through our before and afterschool program.

Through continuing education of our staff and curriculums designed to align with early learning and development standards, we ensure that we are doing everything we can to assist children in developing socially, emotionally, educationally and behaviorally.

🤝

Social Development

Building the skills children need to connect, communicate, and thrive with others.

💛

Emotional Growth

Creating a safe, nurturing environment where children feel secure and valued.

📚

Educational Standards

Curriculum aligned with early learning and development standards.

⭐

Behavioral Support

Guiding children toward positive behaviors through consistent, caring support.

Children Of Promise Christian Dayschool
